# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy

default:
  image: alpine:3.20
  tags: []
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils findutils git jq
    - chmod +x -R .ci 2>/dev/null || true
    - chmod +x -R scripts 2>/dev/null || true
  interruptible: true
  retry:
    max: 1
    when:
      - runner_system_failure
      - stuck_or_timeout_failure
  cache:
    policy: pull-push
    key: "${CI_PROJECT_PATH_SLUG}-${CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH}"
    paths:
      - .cache/

workflow:
  rules:
    - when: always

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: "50"
  BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR: ".ci"
  BUILD_SCRIPT: ""
  PRE_BUILD_SCRIPT: ""
  POST_BUILD_SCRIPT: ""
  TEST_SCRIPT: ""
  PACKAGE_SCRIPT: ""
  DEPLOY_SCRIPT: ""
  CUSTOM_ENV_FILE: ""
  ALLOW_MISSING_SCRIPTS: "true"
  SHELL: "/bin/bash"
  CI_CUSTOM_TIMEOUT: "60m"

.ci-run:
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail

      run_script() {
        local name="$1"
        local spec="${2:-}"
        local optional="${3:-true}"

        if [ -z "$spec" ]; then
          if [ "$optional" = "true" ]; then
            echo "Skipping $name (not configured)"
            return 0
          fi
          echo "Missing required script for $name"
          return 1
        fi

        if [ -f "$spec" ]; then
          echo "Running $name file: $spec"
          chmod +x "$spec" || true
          "$SHELL" -lc "$spec"
          return 0
        fi

        if [ -f "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${spec}" ]; then
          echo "Running $name file: ${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${spec}"
          chmod +x "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${spec}" || true
          "$SHELL" -lc "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${spec}"
          return 0
        fi

        if [ -f "scripts/${spec}" ]; then
          echo "Running $name file: scripts/${spec}"
          chmod +x "scripts/${spec}" || true
          "$SHELL" -lc "scripts/${spec}"
          return 0
        fi

        echo "Running $name command: $spec"
        "$SHELL" -lc "$spec"
      }

      if [ -n "${CUSTOM_ENV_FILE:-}" ] && [ -f "${CUSTOM_ENV_FILE}" ]; then
        echo "Loading env file: ${CUSTOM_ENV_FILE}"
        set -a
        . "${CUSTOM_ENV_FILE}"
        set +a
      fi

      echo "CI custom pipeline: shared runners; developer-defined scripts"
  timeout: $CI_CUSTOM_TIMEOUT

validate:
  stage: validate
  extends: .ci-run
  rules:
    - when: always
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      missing=0

      check_one() {
        local var="$1"
        local val="${!var:-}"
        if [ -n "$val" ]; then
          echo "$var=$val"
          return 0
        fi
        return 0
      }

      check_one BUILD_SCRIPT
      check_one PRE_BUILD_SCRIPT
      check_one POST_BUILD_SCRIPT
      check_one TEST_SCRIPT
      check_one PACKAGE_SCRIPT
      check_one DEPLOY_SCRIPT

      if [ "${ALLOW_MISSING_SCRIPTS}" != "true" ]; then
        if [ -z "${BUILD_SCRIPT}" ] && [ ! -f "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh" ] && [ ! -f "scripts/build.sh" ]; then
          echo "BUILD_SCRIPT not set and no default build.sh found in ${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/ or scripts/"
          missing=1
        fi
      fi

      exit "$missing"

build:
  stage: build
  extends: .ci-run
  rules:
    - when: on_success
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      if [ -n "${PRE_BUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        run_script "pre_build" "${PRE_BUILD_SCRIPT}" "true"
      elif [ -f "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/pre_build.sh" ]; then
        run_script "pre_build" "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/pre_build.sh" "true"
      elif [ -f "scripts/pre_build.sh" ]; then
        run_script "pre_build" "scripts/pre_build.sh" "true"
      else
        echo "No pre_build script"
      fi

      if [ -n "${BUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        run_script "build" "${BUILD_SCRIPT}" "${ALLOW_MISSING_SCRIPTS}"
      elif [ -f "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh" ]; then
        run_script "build" "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh" "${ALLOW_MISSING_SCRIPTS}"
      elif [ -f "scripts/build.sh" ]; then
        run_script "build" "scripts/build.sh" "${ALLOW_MISSING_SCRIPTS}"
      else
        if [ "${ALLOW_MISSING_SCRIPTS}" = "true" ]; then
          echo "No build script configured; skipping"
        else
          echo "No build script configured; failing"
          exit 1
        fi
      fi

      if [ -n "${POST_BUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        run_script "post_build" "${POST_BUILD_SCRIPT}" "true"
      elif [ -f "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/post_build.sh" ]; then
        run_script "post_build" "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/post_build.sh" "true"
      elif [ -f "scripts/post_build.sh" ]; then
        run_script "post_build" "scripts/post_build.sh" "true"
      else
        echo "No post_build script"
      fi
  artifacts:
    when: always
    expire_in: 7 days
    paths:
      - dist/
      - build/
      - out/
      - .cache/

test:
  stage: test
  extends: .ci-run
  rules:
    - when: on_success
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      if [ -n "${TEST_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        run_script "test" "${TEST_SCRIPT}" "true"
      elif [ -f "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.sh" ]; then
        run_script "test" "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.sh" "true"
      elif [ -f "scripts/test.sh" ]; then
        run_script "test" "scripts/test.sh" "true"
      else
        echo "No test script; skipping"
      fi
  artifacts:
    when: always
    expire_in: 7 days
    reports:
      junit:
        - junit.xml
        - reports/junit.xml
        - test-results/junit.xml
    paths:
      - reports/
      - test-results/
      - coverage/
      - .cache/

package:
  stage: package
  extends: .ci-run
  rules:
    - when: on_success
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      if [ -n "${PACKAGE_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        run_script "package" "${PACKAGE_SCRIPT}" "true"
      elif [ -f "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.sh" ]; then
        run_script "package" "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.sh" "true"
      elif [ -f "scripts/package.sh" ]; then
        run_script "package" "scripts/package.sh" "true"
      else
        echo "No package script; skipping"
      fi
  artifacts:
    when: always
    expire_in: 14 days
    paths:
      - dist/
      - build/
      - out/
      - package/
      - .cache/

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  extends: .ci-run
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: manual
      allow_failure: true
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
      when: manual
      allow_failure: true
    - when: never
  environment:
    name: "${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      if [ -n "${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        run_script "deploy" "${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}" "true"
      elif [ -f "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy.sh" ]; then
        run_script "deploy" "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy.sh" "true"
      elif [ -f "scripts/deploy.sh" ]; then
        run_script "deploy" "scripts/deploy.sh" "true"
      else
        echo "No deploy script; skipping"
      fi
